name: Turkey Breasts Marsala
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Dried basil (substitute raspberries for Suzz)
1/4 teaspoon Dried oregano (substitute cranberries for April)
6 tablespoons Chicken stock (substitute squid for Sandy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay each turkey slice between 2 pieces of waxed paper and pound thin with the flat side of a large knife.
2. Dip into a mixture of basil, oregano, and flour.
3. Heat butter to sizzling in a large skillet.
4. Saute' turkey breasts until golden brown, 2 to 3 minutes on each side.
5. Add Marsala, stock, salt, and pepper. Cook uncovered about 3 minutes, turning once.
6. Pour pan juices over, garnish with parsley, and serve immediately. Serves 6.
